text: Tempat nya asik, adem, sejuk, alami, fasilitas juga oke tinggal akses jalan nya aja agar bisa di perbaiki biar lebih joss

text:
Bagus,,,,,udaranya sejuk dan nuansa alam yang msh alami.Naik offroad landrover nya jg menantang adrenalin.
Pokok nya puas

text: Tempatnya cakep bgt dooong ... Adem .... Ada live music juga .... Banyak spot foto lucu lucu... Banyak jajanan gemes juga

text: Yg mau kesini cari d google maps saung kondang ya ati2 jangan curug halimun. Klo di gmpas curuh halimun jalannya jauh bgt!

17-18 agustus 2019

The view is beautiful.

text: TWA. G. Tangkuban Parahu lebih apik sekarang. Setelah lebih dari 10 tahun baru kesini lagi, banyak perubahan yg lebih baik.

text:
Kesempatan yg sangat berhrga bs mengunjungi tangkuban perahu.. Udarany yg sangat sejuk
Dan keindahan kaawahny wooow top bgt

text: Pemandangan ya luar biasa,, banyak yg foto praweding disini.. Tiket masuk hanya 8000 sewa ban cuma 5000,wisata keluarga murah meriah..
english_translation: The view is extraordinary, many have their pre-wedding photos taken here. Entrance ticket is only 8,000, tire rental is only 5,000, a cheap and cheerful family outing.

text: Lumayan lah tempatnya buat acara2 keluarga,ada mushola ada kantin yaa lengkap deh,cuma masih kurang seru kalo kesini buat main air mah
english_translation: The place is quite decent for family events, it has a prayer room and a canteen, so it's complete. It's just not that exciting if you come here to play in the water.

text: Tempatnya sejuk nyaman, buat acara keluarga jd menyenangkan. Cuma sayang... datangnya saat musim hujan jadi ga bisa kemana-mana heheee
english_translation: The place is cool and comfortable, making family events enjoyable. It's just a shame... we came during the rainy season so we couldn't go anywhere heheee

text: cocok buat outbon atau yg bawa banyak rombongan. Tempat cukup luas dengan fasilitas yg memadai. Pernah coba nginep ala tenda, OK juga.
english_translation: Suitable for outbound trips or large groups. The place is quite spacious with adequate facilities. I've tried camping-style accommodation, which was also okay.

text: Penataan lokasi nya baik dan asri, jg sbg sarana olah raga sepeda, ticket masuknya sedikit mahal namun sesuai dg benefit yg diberikan.
english_translation: The location's arrangement is good and beautiful, also serving as a facility for cycling sports. The entrance ticket is a bit expensive but commensurate with the benefits provided.

text: Tempat yg sangat bagus untuk berlibur di akhir pekan.htm sangat murah 10k termasuk parkir motor.bisa berenang atau pun befoto-foto saja
english_translation: A great place for a weekend getaway. Very cheap at 10k including motorcycle parking. You can swim or just take photos.

text: Banyak pilihan jajan makanan dari mulai pisang goreng sampai tahu gejrot. Bagi yang suka naik sepeda air juga bisa menjadi pilihan 😁👍 …
english_translation: Many food snack options, from fried bananas to tahu gejrot. For those who like paddle boating, that can also be an option 😁👍

text: Nice place. Untuk merefresh pikiran, tempatnya adem, harga di cafe nya jg standart. Rekomended buat piknik keluarga maupun dg pasangan.
english_translation: Nice place. To refresh your mind, the place is cool, and the prices at the cafe are also standard. Recommended for family picnics or with a partner.

text: Kalau kesini jangan yang lewat guha pawon, langsung aja ke yang parkirannya keatas. Yang jalan disebelah timur dari lokasi stone garden
english_translation: If you come here, don't take the route through Pawon cave. Go directly to the uphill parking lot. The road is to the east of the Stone Garden location.

text: Waktu berkunjung pas panas2nya. Untuk teteh dan aa  pegawainya full senyum. Ramah2. Untuk yang live musik top banget, bisa semua lagu..
english_translation: The visit was during the hottest part of the day. The staff, both sisters and brothers, were all smiles. Very friendly. For the live music, it was top-notch, they could play any song.

text: Cocok bagi pendaki amatir yg ingen menikmati suasana seperti di gunug sesungguhnya 😂. Bisa ngecamp juga loh. HTM 5000 jika tanpa camp …
english_translation: Suitable for amateur climbers who want to enjoy the atmosphere like in a real mountain 😂. You can also camp. Entrance fee is 5000 if without camping…
